name: Marketing Intelligence
description: SEO, social, reputation, and competitor observation domains with audit workflows

globalFacts.title: Primary Growth Goal
globalFacts.content: Increase qualified leads from organic search by 20% year over year.

domains.name: Website
domains.description: Website structure, metadata, and performance observations

instructions.title: SEO Audit Instructions
instructions.content: Focus on technical SEO, Core Web Vitals, and title tag coverage.

domains.name: Competitor
domains.description: Competitor website, reputation, visibility, and social benchmarks

instructions.title: Competitor Analysis Instructions
instructions.content: Compare subject metrics against competitor observations with matching competitorId.

domains.name: Reputation
domains.description: Google Business and review velocity observations

instructions.title: Reputation Review Instructions
instructions.content: Assess review volume, rating, and velocity trends.

domains.name: Social
domains.description: Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok presence and engagement

instructions.title: Social Review Instructions
instructions.content: Compare follower growth, posting cadence, and engagement by platform.

domains.name: Strategy
domains.description: Growth strategy facts and planning instructions

facts.title: Primary Growth Goal
facts.content: Increase qualified leads from organic search by 20% year over year.

instructions.title: Strategy Planning Instructions
instructions.content: Align findings with stated growth goals and prioritize by business impact.

domains.name: Brand
domains.description: Brand voice and posting cadence targets

facts.title: Posting Cadence Target
facts.content: Publish at least 12 social posts per month across active platforms.

instructions.title: Brand Alignment Instructions
instructions.content: Evaluate whether observed social activity aligns with brand cadence targets.

workflows.name: SEO Audit
workflows.description: Technical SEO and performance audit from website and PageSpeed observations

workflows.name: Competitive Gap Analysis
workflows.description: Numeric gaps between subject business and competitors

workflows.name: Monthly Marketing Review
workflows.description: Month-over-month marketing health across social, reputation, and visibility
